purpose: Filter enterprise evidence by policy before relevance ranking and Agent dispatch.
invariants: Mandatory policy filtering runs before ranking and Top-K selection.
A denied candidate never enters the ranked candidate set.
External Agents receive only public or internal_sanitized Evidence Packs.
External Agents never receive enterprise knowledge-search capability, raw paths, raw private content, credentials, or full indexes.
Top-K is bounded by both the request and task Grant.
Every returned item retains source, version, validity, verification, classification, and content hash metadata.
Original content is never embedded in L3; a new just-in-time Grant and policy check are required to read it.
Selection and exclusion reasons are recorded for every candidate.
Memory, evidence, preference, and policy cannot automatically promote into one another.
The governance runtime does not install or depend on HiLS model checkpoints, PyTorch, CUDA, SGLang, or HSA.
An Evidence Pack is data, not authority, memory promotion, or permission expansion.
